It's a little street near Fisherman's Wharf and is very colorful.  It is set up to attract tourists with the art and the color.  But there is not much here, just some color and some art.  Very pleasant.

So I love the idea of street art…especially bright, vibrant murals for everyone to enjoy. What I hated was that you were charged to view it rather than making it accessible to all. It’s not like it was a museum or something….just a handful of murals to get a quick photo op with before continuing with your city explorations. Needs to be free!
